title: More Buttons
description: This mod add about 240 new Buttons and pulls textures from the block of minecraft vanilla.
body:
This mod adds around 240 new Buttons. **IMPORTANT !** The mod require [Blackwolf Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/blackwolf-library) to work ! The mod extracts textures from their respective vanilla Minecraft block. So they can be overriden with resource packs as usual. Compatible with all resource packs. It's compatible with: [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) To create these new buttons you must first create the Button Frame. Below examples of the recipe. You can use any button from the vanilla game for the recipe. (For example: Wooden Button, Stone Button, ect...). You can now use the Button Frame with a block whose texture you want. Below are some examples. Some Buttons have particular sounds, different from normal buttons.

Some Buttons

Button Frame

Some crafting examples (from crafting you can get 6 buttons)

Fire Button

Sand Button

Honey Button

Crying Obsidian Button

Special Buttons

For some buttons you need particular crafting, you can use [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) to see them. They are: Fire Button, Fire Soul Button, Lava Button(2 version), Nether Portal and Strange Button(no texture). ![Partener server host link](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/112d23b8-9986-4823-80de-d312484cf8c8.webp) BisectHosting offers quick, simple and high quality server hosting with over a dozen locations available across the world, ensuring low latency. After your purchase, the server is already configured and ready to use. With their 24/7 support and fast-response time, no issues shall stand in your way!  Use the promo code BLACKWOLF to get a 25% discount off your first month when buying any of their gaming servers.  https://bisecthosting.com/blackwolf ***Feel free to use this mod on your modpack***
